recommendations.title: Cold War
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman meet in the ruins of post-war Poland. With vastly different backgrounds and temperaments, they are fatally mismatched and yet drawn to each other.

recommendations.title: The Woman in the Fifth
recommendations.overview: An American writer moves to Paris to be closer to his daughter and finds himself falling immediately on hard times.

recommendations.title: My Summer of Love

recommendations.title: To Be or Not to Be
recommendations.overview: During the Nazi occupation of Poland, an acting troupe becomes embroiled in a Polish soldier's efforts to track down a German spy.

recommendations.title: Miracles from Heaven
recommendations.overview: When Christy discovers her 10-year-old daughter Anna has a rare, incurable disease, she becomes a ferocious advocate for her daughter’s healing as she searches for a solution. After Anna has a freak accident and falls three stories, a miracle unfolds

recommendations.title: The First Beautiful Thing

recommendations.title: Gods
recommendations.overview: Set in communist Poland of the 80s the movie depicts early career of cardio surgeon Zbigniew Religa.
